inputs.label: Power (W)
inputs.businessContext: The power in watts to be converted to various horsepower units.

businessContext_i18n.en: The power in watts to be converted to various horsepower units.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Watts cinsinden güç, çeşitli beygir gücü birimlerine dönüştürülecek.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Leistung in Watt, die in verschiedene Pferdestärkeeinheiten umgerechnet werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La puissance en watts à convertir en différentes unités de chevaux-vapeur.
businessContext_i18n.es: La potencia en vatios a convertir a varias unidades de caballos de fuerza.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الطاقة بالواط المراد تحويلها إلى وحدات حصان مختلفة.

inputs.label: Mechanical HP Factor (W/HP)
inputs.businessContext: Conversion factor for mechanical/imperial horsepower (1 HP = 745.6998715822702 W).

businessContext_i18n.en: Conversion factor for mechanical/imperial horsepower (1 HP = 745.6998715822702 W).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mekanik/emperyal beygir gücü için dönüşüm faktörü (1 HP = 745,6998715822702 W).
businessContext_i18n.de: Umrechnungsfaktor für mechanische/imperiale Pferdestärke (1 PS = 745,6998715822702 W).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion pour le cheval-vapeur mécanique/impérial (1 HP = 745,6998715822702 W).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de conversión para caballos de fuerza mecánicos/imperiales (1 HP = 745,6998715822702 W).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل التحويل للحصان الميكانيكي/الإمبراطوري (1 حصان = 745.6998715822702 واط).
